queue_intent: Playable game loop tranche: market bind, fleet counts, ship controls, lane labels, HUD, slots, hero trading. Built from repo HEAD c14d68243a137c9361137f7e497ce06cfeb38a68

tasks.title: GATE.S4.CATALOG.MARKET_BIND.001: Bind goods catalog to market seeding v0
tasks.intent: GalaxyGenerator or WorldLoader seeds market good_ids from ContentRegistryLoader goods list on world gen; each generated market has >=2 good_ids present in catalog; SimBridge injects registry at gen time; dotnet test MarketCatalogBind_FreshWorld_HasCatalogGoods asserts state.Markets values contain catalog good_ids; tweak guard passes.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.
completion_hint: dotnet test SimCore.Tests/SimCore.Tests.csproj -c Release --filter "MarketCatalogBind" PASS + full dotnet test PASS

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.S1.GALAXY_MAP.FLEET_COUNTS.001: Fleet counts per node in galaxy overlay v0

If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.
completion_hint: dotnet build "Space Trade Empire.csproj" --nologo && godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tests/test_galaxy_map_overlay.gd run twice; SHA256 match + dotnet test pass
